repeatedFinding: Background documentation freshness was repeatedly described as report-only, but prose alone did not prevent self-source, self-review, self-publication, target drift, or publication without recovery/readback.
evidence: tooling/control-policy.test.ts rejects candidate self-source, candidate-root ownership, generator review/publication, incomplete publication, and automation self-feedback.
docs/documentation-audit/freshness-candidates/HGI-306-report-only-example.json is a typed isolated candidate with no edit or publication authority.
The docs-maintainer skill now routes to the typed contract instead of duplicating its full field list.
rollback: Restore the prior skill wording only if the typed contract and executable fixtures are reverted together; keep report-only behavior and do not publish existing candidates.
nonClaim: The promoted contract does not schedule a scanner, edit repository source, publish policy, or prove external state.
